change_comments.message:
Looks like the documentation links check is failing due to references to the Gerrit GitWeb interface. We might want to update these to use the GitHub mirror equivalent link. The GitWeb interface has been widely abused by bots and scrapers and recently we've had to disable this due to high system load (making the Gerrit server unresponsive).

i.e. A Gerrit GitWeb URL like this:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=ccsdk/cds.git;a=tree;f=components/model-catalog/blueprint-model/uat-blueprints/pnf_config/Tests;h=230d506720c4a1066784c1fe9e0ba0206bbb13cf;hb=refs/heads/master

Becomes something like the below:
https://github.com/onap/ccsdk-cds/tree/52f99b48facfad69776a408a3958e1f797034ae5/components/model-catalog/blueprint-model/uat-blueprints/pnf_config/Tests
The GitWeb interface got re-enabled this morning. Some of these jobs may now pass. We'll need to consider whether a longer-term project to update to equivalent GitHub links is a worthwhile exercise.
